response.justification: The candidate lacks direct experience with SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator hardware optimization, or deep-learning workload analysis — core requirements for the Principal Performance Architect role. Their background is predominantly in full-stack web and mobile development, with no evidence of hardware-software co-design, GPU architecture, or performance modeling for AI accelerators, despite extensive software engineering experience.
strengths: Strong full-stack engineering skills across multiple languages and platforms
Demonstrated open-source contributions and technical communication via workshops
Experience with performance-critical systems using DLang and asynchronous I/O
concerns: No evidence of SoC, IP, or AI accelerator hardware modeling experience
Lacks background in deep-learning workload optimization or GPU architecture
Education is a BS in CS — insufficient without 8+ years of relevant hardware performance experience
